scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/forma build && corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/openai build && corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/cli build
scripts.check: corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/forma build && corepack pnpm -r run check
scripts.test:ts: corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/forma test && corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/openai test && corepack pnpm --filter @forma-lang/cli test
scripts.examples:check: tsc -p examples/tsconfig.json && vitest run examples/review_diff_decision.test.ts && python -m py_compile examples/embedded_agent.py examples/review_diff_forma.py examples/review_diff_package.py examples/review_diff_lock_consumer.py examples/review_diff_decision.py examples/review_diff_contract/__init__.py examples/tool_permission_workflow.py examples/function_repair/repair_function_forma.py examples/function_repair/repair_function_package.py && PYTHONPATH=examples python examples/review_diff_decision_test.py
